body.title: Determine disposition of unclear skills (map-igor, outcome, eval-run, weekly-retro, factory-create, critic, new)
body.intention: I intend that no skill survives by default — each unclear one gets a keep/fold/retire recommendation.
body.description:
**Problem:** several skills have unclear disposition; decide keep/fold/retire for each. **Shape:** read each SKILL.md, report one-line purpose + recommendation:
- map-igor — exists ONLY in ~/.claude (drifted orphan); what is it, retire or migrate?
- outcome, eval-run, weekly-retro — Akien has never explicitly run weekly-retro; provisional: FOLD the weekly tracks into the daily (day-close) rather than separate skills. Confirm what each does first.
- factory-create, critic — repo-only; Akien only vaguely knows (critic likely 'launch the critic against a ticket'). Clarify + recommend (note: critic likely folds into /device <dev> critic per T-device-skills-via-uu-device).
- 'new' / 'new agent' — no such skill exists in repo or ~/.claude; get a pointer from Akien on what was meant.
**Affected files:** none (investigation); output is a disposition table. **Design rules:** none apply. **Scope boundary:** IN — read + recommend. OUT — executing the dispositions (follow-on tickets). **Test plan:** no tests because investigation-only; output is a disposition table feeding the /sorted lock. **Completion criteria:** each listed skill has a recorded purpose + keep/fold/retire recommendation.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
…and 38 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set

## Akien 2026-06-24 — resolved via intention_review (docs/skills_intention_review_20260623.md)
§F SCAFFOLDING — KEEP (no investigation needed): **new-agent, factory-create, critic** (and skills-sync, whose role shrinks to the symlink-flip + conflict-alarm — tracked with the single-source work).
§E already-deleted 2026-06-23: ADCHelp, decided. cognition-debug + debug-pe-chain DELETE (tracked on T-skills-prune-deprecated-merge).
REMAINING open dispositions for THIS ticket: only **map-igor** (~/.claude-only orphan — what is it, retire or migrate to igor's bin/) and the weekly-tracks question (**outcome / eval-run / weekly-retro** — fold into daily/day-close vs keep separate).
body.result: Disposition table recorded. map-igor: KEEP local-only — Igor-runtime full-state snapshot tool (Haiku, writes ~/.unseen_university/maps/), same tier as diagnose/igor-diagnose; correctly stays local-only per two-tier (not a managed workflow skill), candidate to fold into 'uu device <dev>' view in Phase B. outcome: KEEP — core reasoning-bearing workflow skill that closes the hypothesis/learning loop at decision close; NOT a weekly track. eval-run + weekly-retro: FOLD (recommendation) — they already auto-fire only inside day-close's Friday branch and are never run standalone; keep as the day-close Friday implementation, do not promote as standalone workflow verbs. Actual fold deferred to follow-on (would touch frozen day-close; skills frozen for Friday demo). new-agent/factory-create/critic/skills-sync already resolved KEEP (scaffolding) per intention_review §F.
body.unproven_reason: Investigation/disposition ticket — no red->green lever for keep/fold/retire recommendations; the recommendations ARE the deliverable, follow-on execution tickets are separate.
